name: Oval 5' x 7' Bold Stripe Braided Jute Area Rug Black/Tan/Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
The Bold-Stripe Jute Oval Area Rug from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia will add a dash of natural flair to your home. Made from 100% jute, this oval rug has a richly textured and earthy look. It's finished with a braided design featuring bold stripes in natural tan, black and cream hues for added flair. Easy to blend in any decor, this flat-pile rug lends a versatile placement option for anywhere in your home, from the family room to your living room or any other high-traffic areas.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
